title: Apply filter/hide/sort/conditional formatting WITHOUT having to create new view
excerpt: I would love to be able to apply filter/hide/sort/conditional formatting and have it stick without creating a new view. I don’t want a bunch of tables with different views, I just want to be able to hide columns complete…

posts.author: DanielaHuber (Daniela Huber)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to apply filter/hide/sort/conditional formatting and have it stick without creating a new view. I don’t want a bunch of tables with different views, I just want to be able to hide columns completely (like board linked columns), sort by a lable/status, or use conditional formatting without creating multiple views that always lead to confusion.
